failedAssertions.reason: Sign command dispatch succeeds but a Sign row was not observable in runtime_status.pending_operations.
Completion is in AppState but required explicit sign-success UI feedback was not observed.
Peer-response ratio was not rendered in the modal for the observed real failure payload.
Retry path could not dispatch because failure request_id had no correlated message in signDispatchLog; Retry stayed disabled.
AppState completion slice updated, but completion-driven success UI feedback was not observable.
Non-sign failures were present and modal stayed closed, but no visible toast/row error indicator was found for those failures.
Unable to observe disconnect/timeout sign-failure transition for the offline-mid-sign path in this run.
Paused behavior correctly returned requestId=null for sign/ecdh/ping, but after resume controls stayed disabled (sign_ready=false) and sign command did not produce a dispatchable requestId.
Tab order reached Refresh peers, Test Sign, and Test ECDH, but no dedicated Ping trigger was reachable and Enter activation did not create a pending op in this run.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Could not observe document.visibilityState hidden transition in headless agent-browser tab switching, so VAL-OPS-021 visibility evidence could not be conclusively collected.

Reconnect + post-reconnect completion correlation could not be conclusively validated due missing websocket reconnect/frame observability in agent-browser and timeout outcome during reconnect attempt.
Could not reproduce nonce-refill overlay state in this isolated single-session run; runtime snapshot did not expose nonce_pool_size for trend verification.
Pending-state cleanup behavior verified, but required WS close frame code evidence could not be observed with available tooling.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance for agent-browser isolation/evidence rules and recorded m1-ops tooling limitations for visibility and websocket frame capture.

dedupedBlockers.description: VAL-OPS-024 precondition (nonce-pool refill phase with observable pool trend) could not be reproduced in this single-session isolation run.
dedupedBlockers.quickFixAttempted: Seeded runtime via __iglooTestSeedRuntime and exercised degraded/connecting states; overlay and nonce_pool_size signal were still unavailable.

dedupedBlockers.description: Could not collect required visibilityState hidden->visible evidence in this headless agent-browser execution.
dedupedBlockers.quickFixAttempted: Installed visibilitychange logger, backgrounded tab for >20s, and rechecked log; only 'visible' was recorded.

dedupedBlockers.description: Could not obtain websocket reconnect/close frame-level telemetry (request/frame/close-code) from agent-browser network output.
dedupedBlockers.quickFixAttempted: Used set offline on/off, runtime relay state checks, network request capture, and post-reopen pending-state validation; frame-level evidence still unavailable.
